section.heading: Appropriations to carry out sections 2632 and 2633

content.p: For the purpose of carrying out the provisions of sections 2632 and 2633 of this title there are authorized to be appropriated such sums as the Congress may from time to time determine to be necessary.

note.heading: Codification
note.p: Section was formerly classified to section 1181j of this title prior to editorial reclassification and renumbering as this section.
